author: @AIcon1442
text:
Maybe I not accepted first song Maya, but this so beautiful. I love same… type of songs, characters and etc. 

Characters who try to be a beacon of hope for others, struggling with their own decay and not focusing on it, allowing only themselves to participate in this war. They put off the inevitable, leaving life early to avoid a more terrible fate, and ultimately sacrificing themselves for others. To take their nightmares to the grave. A beautiful aesthetic. It's a shame I'm too selfish to emulate this archetype. Although, perhaps they almost always exist only in an unreal reality...

author: @controverse_av
text:
This is a really cool one!

I wanted to say a big thank you for the previous days/morimens track. I ended up putting it in a last minute test trailer for my game project for uni, it literally saved me. 
Both are great osts, but the first one is an excellent game theme for various situations.

author: @currentlyvibing9916
text:
I kinda maybe perhaps got her to +3 because i really like her and it turns out she is helping my midgame ass out on an ABSURD level because of that corrosion thing, like I’ve got no business doing the amount of damage I’m doing and while trivialising things that actually might be pretty difficult for me without her

Of course I’m nowhere near endgame level of silly numbers yet but this just makes me absurdly excited for what’s to come

Edit: oh yeah i got her wheel too

author: @鮎木佐彩子
text:
【銀の鍵】

原作では出番らしい出番は無かったけれども、こうして沙耶の手の内にある事が嬉しくてたまらない。

虚淵玄氏がスランプだかの状態でこんなのは受けないだろうと生み出しながらも、その実沙耶の唄は大いに受けにウケた。
元ネタが火の鳥であろうとも、其処にクトゥルフ神話が合わさればさらなる物語り紡ぎ出す(無論悲劇も)

私達、【沙耶の唄】を求める者達にとって、今回の2026.5/31から始まったコラボレーションは本当に“広大な砂漠=流れた月日”　を歩んで出会えたオアシスに等しいです。

いとうかなこさんの新たなる歌

PV

そして……このドラマと本当に、こんなに嬉しいことはない！！
video_title: 【忘却前夜 × 沙耶の唄】コラボラジオドラマ「使者」
